name: Two-Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: or 3/4 cup egg beaters® (99% egg substitute)
1/4 cup chopped green bell pepper, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish lightly.
2. In a small pan, sauté the green bell pepper and onion until crisp-tender.
3. In a large bowl, combine the creamed corn, niblet corn, eggs (or egg beaters), and corn muffin mix. Blend well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese over the top of the casserole.
6. Place the casserole in a preheated oven (350°F or 175°C) and bake for one hour, or until firm and set.
7. Remove from the oven and let stand for 5 minutes before serving to allow it to cool slightly.
